curation.synopsis: Collection bridging the Eisenhorn and Bequin arcs: a chronological set of Eisenhorn short stories ("Regia Occulta", "The Strange Demise of Titus Endor", "Master Imus's Transgression", "The Curiosity", "Gardens of Tycho", "Missing in Action", "Backcloth for a Crown Additional", "Thorn Wishes Talon", "Playing Patience", "Perihelion") and a brand-new closing novella, The Magos, in which Eisenhorn confronts Tech-Magos Bure of the Mechanicus and a Necron-trace artefact that may rewrite the price of one of his old bargains. The Magos itself is the longest single piece in the volume and the only original story; the surrounding shorts are reprints. Best read after the Eisenhorn omnibus and before Pariah for full continuity.

flags.reasoning: The Magos is structurally a collection of 10 reprinted short stories anchored by one new title novella. SSOT classifies it as novel; the data_conflict suggests collection (or anthology). Note: also missing from book-roster.json.collections is the parent-child relationship between The Magos and the included Eisenhorn shorts — that's a Maintainer-Excel edit, not a runtime fix.
